title: astragalus ornithopodioides
intro: Astragalus ornithopodioides, also known as milk vetch, is a perennial plant belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of China and Mongolia. Traditionally, the roots of this plant have been used in herbal medicine to boost the immune system and improve overall health. The medicinal properties of Astragalus ornithopodioides are attributed to its ability to stimulate the production of white blood cells, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Astragalus ornithopodioides can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used to alleviate symptoms of fatigue, stress, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
